outbound.detail: Wed 26 Mar · 9:15 AM → 1:05 PM · BS217 · US-Bangla Airlines

return.label: Return
return.detail: Mon 31 Mar · 1:55 PM → 3:25 PM · BS218 · US-Bangla Airlines

internal.label: Bangkok → Phuket
internal.detail: Wed 26 Mar · 5:15 PM → 6:45 PM · FD3009 · Thai AirAsia

internal.label: Phuket → Bangkok
internal.detail: Sat 29 Mar · 8:50 AM → 10:15 AM · FD8057 · Thai AirAsia

acts.tx: Depart Dhaka DAC — BS217, US-Bangla Airlines.
Land Bangkok Suvarnabhumi (BKK). Clear immigration + bags. Out by ~2:00 PM.
Grab: Suvarnabhumi BKK → Don Mueang DMK. ~1–1.5 hrs. THB 350–450. Use Grab app to avoid overcharging.
Quick bite at DMK: Airport Food Court (THB 100–150) or S&P Restaurant (sit-down, THB 250–350/person).
Flight FD3009, Thai AirAsia: DMK → Phuket HKT. 1h 30m.
Arrive Phuket International Airport HKT.
Check in: Quip Bed & Breakfast, Phuket.
Dinner — hotel restaurant (easy option) or One Chun Café & Restaurant (authentic local Thai, walkable). THB 300–500.
Bangla Road nightlife, Patong Beach. Bars, live music, street entertainment. Grab ~15–20 mins, THB 300 each way.
Hotel pickup & transfer to pier. Included with most tours or short taxi THB 200–300.
Full-day Phi Phi Island tour. Maya Bay, Monkey Beach, snorkeling spots & Viking Cave. ~THB 1,500/person. Lunch included on board. ~4 hrs return.
Return boat to Rassada Pier, Phuket.
Back at Quip B&B. Rest and freshen up.
Dinner — hotel (relaxing) or Tu Kab Khao (southern Thai cuisine, 5-min walk). THB 400–700.
Big Buddha (free) + Wat Chalong (~THB 50 donation). ~2 hrs total. Taxi ~25 mins, THB 350. Cover knees and shoulders.
Kata Beach. Swim, relax, and enjoy the clear water. ~2.5 hrs. Taxi ~15 mins, THB 200.
Karon Viewpoint — panoramic 3-bay view — then lunch at Heaven Restaurant. Taxi ~5 mins, THB 100–150.
Free time — Old Phuket Town: Sino-Portuguese heritage buildings, street art, cafés. Coffee at Three Monkeys Restaurant.
Phuket Fantasea cultural show — elephants, acrobatics, magic. ~THB 1,800–2,000/person. Dinner included at venue. Taxi ~40 mins, THB 600 round trip.
Check out. Taxi to Phuket Airport HKT. ~30 mins, THB 300–400.
Flight FD8057, Thai AirAsia: HKT → Bangkok Don Mueang DMK. 1h 25m.
Arrive Bangkok Don Mueang DMK.
Grab to QG Resort. ~20 mins, THB 250.
Check in: QG Resort, Bangkok.
Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew. ~1.5 hrs. THB 400/person. Smart dress required — cover knees and shoulders. Sarongs at gate.
Wat Arun (Temple of Dawn). THB 100/person. 5-min ferry from Tha Tien pier, THB 5.
Chatuchak Weekend Market. Free. Hundreds of stalls — fashion, antiques, crafts, street food. Open weekends only.
Return to QG Resort. Freshen up.
Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise. ~THB 1,500/person. City skyline at night, live music, buffet dinner.
Depart for Pattaya. ~2 hrs. Private taxi THB 1,500–2,000 round trip or shared minivan THB 200–300/person.
Sanctuary of Truth — all-wood ancient-style castle by the sea. THB 500/person. ~1.5 hrs.
Pattaya Beach walk + Pattaya Floating Market. THB 200 entry. Thai street food, souvenirs, boat rides.
Lunch at The Glass House Pattaya — beachfront seafood dining. THB 600–900/person.
Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai). Free. 18-metre Buddha overlooking Pattaya Bay.
Alcazar Cabaret Show (optional). THB 800/person. World-famous cabaret — spectacular costumes and choreography.
Return to Bangkok. ~2 hrs.
Airport transfer: QG Resort → Suvarnabhumi BKK. ~30 mins, THB 500. Book through hotel the night before.
Arrive BKK. Check-in + security. US-Bangla Airlines BS218, Terminal 2.
Flight BS218 departs Bangkok BKK.
Land Dhaka DAC — Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport, Terminal 1.

budget.note: BKK→DMK Grab · HKT taxis · Pattaya round trip 1,750 · Bangkok Grab/taxis · airport transfers
Phi Phi Island tour 3,000 · Grand Palace 800 · Wat Arun 200 · Sanctuary of Truth 1,000 · Floating Market 400 · Phuket Fantasea 4,000 · misc 1,600
Street food + local restaurants ~THB 1,000/day for two + dinner cruise 3,000
Quip B&B 3 nights · QG Resort 2 nights
Excludes international flights. Add Alcazar show 1,600 + personal spending buffer ~THB 3,000–5,000.

notes.title: Transport
notes.text: Use Grab app for taxis in Bangkok and Phuket — avoids metered taxi haggling. For Pattaya, negotiate a fixed price before boarding or book a private car.

notes.title: Airports
notes.text: Bangkok has two airports: Suvarnabhumi (BKK) for international, Don Mueang (DMK) for AirAsia domestic. BKK→DMK transfer takes ~1–1.5 hrs; allow at least 2 hrs buffer.

notes.title: Dress Code
notes.text: Cover knees and shoulders at Grand Palace, Wat Arun, and Wat Chalong. Sarongs can be borrowed at temple entrances.

notes.title: Cash
notes.text: Carry THB cash — street food, tuk-tuks, and markets are cash-only. ATMs widely available in Bangkok and Phuket (THB 220 foreign fee per transaction).
